Web search: The Fillmore San Francisco has 500 seated capacity in main auditorium (800 standing). Metadata value of 1200 is incorrect.
Web search: Red Rocks Amphitheatre official capacity is 9,525 (https://www.coloradoamphitheater.com/red-rocks-amphitheatre-information/)
Web search: Madison Square Garden has capacity of 19,738 (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Madison_Square_Garden). Metadata claims 20789, which is incorrect.

Web search: Hollywood Bowl has seating capacity of nearly 18,000, the largest natural amphitheater in US (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hollywood_Bowl). Metadata value 17500 is close but slightly understated.
Web search: Ryman Auditorium has capacity of 2,362 (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ryman_Auditorium)
Web search: 9:30 Club Washington DC has capacity of 1,200 (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/9:30_Club)
Web search: First Avenue Minneapolis mainroom capacity is 1,550 (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/First_Avenue_(nightclub)). Metadata claims 1500, which is off by 50.
Web search: The Midnight is a synthwave band (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Midnight)
Web search: Tame Impala is a psychedelic rock band (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tame_Impala)
Web search: Vulfpeck is a funk/soul band (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vulfpeck)
Web search: Khruangbin is described as psychedelic funk (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Khruangbin)
Web search: Glass Animals is classified as indie pop, indie rock, and psychedelic pop (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Glass_Animals)
Web search: St. Vincent's music is characterized as art rock, rock, pop, and indie rock (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/St._Vincent_(musician))
Web search: Thundercat is a jazz-fusion and funk musician (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Thundercat_(musician))

privileged_info_summary: The legacy_concert_normalization task uses synthetically generated data, not real concert bookings. The dataset contains exactly 50 concert records normalized from 7 unique venues and 7 unique artists. Data is generated at task initialization via embedded Python script. Path metadata is accurate: raw data at /home/ga/Documents/concerts_raw.csv, target database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/concert_bookings.db. Expected tables are correct: Venues, Artists, Concerts. Artist genre classifications are accurate for all 7 artists. However, venue capacity metadata contains inaccuracies: The Fillmore (claimed 1200, actual 500), Madison Square Garden (claimed 20789, actual 19738), Hollywood Bowl (claimed 17500, actual ~18000), and First Avenue (claimed 1500, actual 1550). Red Rocks, Ryman, and 9:30 Club capacities are accurate.
